name: agenttool-collab
description: Local multi-session coordination across agents and linked Git worktrees

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate agent sessions across linked Git worktrees.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local SQLite coordination journal for resumable sessions, advisory path claims, reports and challenges, reviewed edit completion, Git checkpoints, and refusable handoffs. MCP arguments and results remain visible to the active model provider, and the host still owns agent lifecycle and wake-up.
defaultPrompt: Coordinate these independent coding sessions locally.
Resume my session and show claimable or conflicted work.
Reconcile these reports and review completed edit tasks.
